title: Earnings call transcript: BigBear.ai misses Q1 2026 earnings expectations
text: BigBear.ai earnings call transcript for Q1 2026 shows the company missed earnings expectations despite revenue beat. The company reported EPS of -$0.12 versus the -$0.08 estimate, indicating weaker profitability performance. However, management highlighted strong wins in national security and defense AI as bright spots in the quarter. The earnings call provided management commentary on backlog quality, conversion rates, and strategic positioning in the federal AI spending market.
